acceptagreement.name: AcceptAgreement
acceptagreement.description: Grants permission to accept an AWS agreement that has not yet been accepted by the customer account

acceptndaforagreement.name: AcceptNdaForAgreement
acceptndaforagreement.description: Grants permission to accept the terms of an NDA Document for a given agreement resource

createcomplianceinquiry.name: CreateComplianceInquiry
createcomplianceinquiry.description: Grants permission to create a compliance inquiry

exportcomplianceinquiry.name: ExportComplianceInquiry
exportcomplianceinquiry.description: Grants permission to export a compliance inquiry

getaccountsettings.name: GetAccountSettings
getaccountsettings.description: Grants permission to get the account settings for Artifact

getagreement.name: GetAgreement
getagreement.description: Grants permission to get an AWS agreement that has not yet been accepted by the customer account

getcomplianceinquirymetadata.name: GetComplianceInquiryMetadata
getcomplianceinquirymetadata.description: Grants permission to get metadata associated with a compliance inquiry

getcustomeragreement.name: GetCustomerAgreement
getcustomeragreement.description: Grants permission to get an AWS agreement that has been accepted by the customer account

getndaforagreement.name: GetNdaForAgreement
getndaforagreement.description: Grants permission to retrieve the NDA Document for a given agreement resource

getreport.name: GetReport
getreport.description: Grants permission to download a report

getreportmetadata.name: GetReportMetadata
getreportmetadata.description: Grants permission to download metadata associated with a report

gettermforreport.name: GetTermForReport
gettermforreport.description: Grants permission to download a term associated with a report

listagreements.name: ListAgreements
listagreements.description: Grants permission to list AWS agreements

listcomplianceinquiries.name: ListComplianceInquiries
listcomplianceinquiries.description: Grants permission to list compliance inquiries submitted by the customer account

listcomplianceinquiryqueries.name: ListComplianceInquiryQueries
listcomplianceinquiryqueries.description: Grants permission to list queries for a compliance inquiry

listcustomeragreements.name: ListCustomerAgreements
listcustomeragreements.description: Grants permission to list customer-agreement resources that have been accepted by the customer account

listreportversions.name: ListReportVersions
listreportversions.description: Grants permission to list report versions in your account

listreports.name: ListReports
listreports.description: Grants permission to list reports in your account

listtagsforresource.name: ListTagsForResource
listtagsforresource.description: Grants permission to list all tags on an AWS Artifact resource

putaccountsettings.name: PutAccountSettings
putaccountsettings.description: Grants permission to put account settings for Artifact

tagresource.name: TagResource
tagresource.description: Grants permission to associate a set of tags with an AWS Artifact resource

terminateagreement.name: TerminateAgreement
terminateagreement.description: Grants permission to terminate a customer agreement that was previously accepted by the customer account

untagresource.name: UntagResource
untagresource.description: Grants permission to remove the association of tags from an AWS Artifact resource
